mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO resource_api (
id,
create_time, update_time,
service_code, api_tags, name, method, path, description,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES (
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{serviceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{apiTags, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )

INSERT INTO resource_api (
id,
create_time, update_time,
service_code, api_tags, name, method, path, description,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES
(
#{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{item.serviceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.apiTags, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE resource_api
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
service_code = #{serviceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
api_tags = #{apiTags, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
method = #{method, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
path = #{path, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE resource_api
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
service_code = #{serviceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
api_tags = #{apiTags, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
method = #{method, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
path = #{path, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version = #{version, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE resource_api
delete_flag = 1, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
service_code, api_tags, name, method, path, description,
delete_flag,
version FROM resource_api WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

SELECT t.id, t.api_name, t.service_name, t.endpoint, t.route_prefix, t.method, t.path, t.status FROM ( SELECT rae.`id`, rae.`name` AS api_name, ae.`name` AS service_name, ae.`endpoint`, ae.`route_prefix`, rae.`method`, rae.`path`, rcur.status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY rae.id ORDER BY CASE rcur.status WHEN 'ACTIVATED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) AS rn FROM user_role_relation urr JOIN role_control_unit_relation rcur ON urr.`role_id` = rcur.`role_id` AND rcur.`delete_flag` = 0 JOIN control_unit_resource_relation curr ON rcur.`control_unit_id` = curr.`control_unit_id` AND curr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND curr.`resource_type` = 'API_ENDPOINT' JOIN resource_api rae ON curr.resource_id = rae.id AND rae.delete_flag = 0 JOIN service_registry ae ON rae.service_code = ae.service_code AND ae.delete_flag = 0 WHERE urr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND urr.`user_id` = #{userId} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1

SELECT DISTINCT rae.`id`, rae.`name` AS api_name, ae.`name` AS service_name, ae.`endpoint`, ae.`route_prefix`, rae.`method`, rae.`path`, 'ACTIVATED' AS status FROM control_unit cu JOIN control_unit_resource_relation curr ON cu.`id` = curr.`control_unit_id` AND curr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND curr.`resource_type` = 'API_ENDPOINT' JOIN resource_api rae ON curr.resource_id = rae.id AND rae.delete_flag = 0 JOIN service_registry ae ON rae.service_code = ae.service_code AND ae.delete_flag = 0 WHERE cu.delete_flag = 0 AND cu.`landing` = 1 AND cu.`control_unit_scope` = 'PERPETUAL' AND cu.`status` = 'PUBLISHED' AND cu.`application_id` = #{applicationId}
